data.title: Search and Rescue (SAR) Mission Control System Software Support and Maintenance Renewal
data.placeOfPerformance: Goddard Space Flight Center, Greenbelt, MD
data.summary: Sole source award to SES Space Solutions for continued software support, maintenance, and enhancement of the Cospas-Sarsat Search and Rescue Mission Control Center (USMCC) software. Justified under FAR 6.302-1 (Only One Responsible Source). No competition — this is an informational notice only.

warnings: Sole source award — no proposal submission opportunity exists.

data.overview: Continued software support, maintenance, and enhancement services for the USMCC system that processes distress signals from ELTs, EPIRBs, and PLBs.

requirements.description: Software support and maintenance for USMCC platform
Operational support for SAR mission-critical systems

incumbentInfo.notes: Sole source award justified under FAR 6.302-1. SES Space Solutions developed the original USMCC software and possesses unique institutional knowledge. No competition.

risks.description: Sole source — no opportunity to compete for this award
Incumbent has proprietary knowledge of MEOLUT algorithms

data.narrativeSummary: Not applicable — sole source award with no competitive opportunity.

criteria.name: TECHNICAL_FIT
criteria.rationale: Sole source — no opportunity to compete regardless of technical fit.

criteria.name: INCUMBENT_RISK
criteria.rationale: Incumbent (SES Space Solutions) has sole source justification. No path to displace.

blockers: Sole source award — no competitive opportunity exists
data.summaryJustification: This is a sole source award notice. SES Space Solutions will receive this contract without competition.
data.decisionRationale: NO_GO because this is a sole source award with no opportunity to submit a proposal.
data.confidenceExplanation: High confidence — the sole source justification is clear and specific.

data.strategy: Not applicable — sole source award to SES Space Solutions.
assumptions: Sole source — no pricing strategy needed
data.basisOfEstimate: Government estimate: $4.2M base, $7.8M ceiling with options.
